dj_text: NovaJane live on That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. Let's go. The vibe goblin ate TAKE ME TO CHURCH | Medieval Bardcore Version | Hozier. To appease it, we must sacrifice Nelly - Hot in Herre [Bardcore / Medieval Style Instrumental Cover].
commercial_text: Hey there, brave navigators of sound!
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} And welcome, all of you tuned into Jazz Jive
recovery_text: Dimensional bleed. Happens sometimes. Never to US, but sometimes.
